title: Add Feature Request / Bug Report Form with Admin-Visible Submissions

requirements.summary: Add a Feedback button in navigation that opens a modal form for submitting feature requests or bug reports
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Feedback' button is visible in the header/nav for all authenticated users
The modal contains a type selector (Feature Request / Bug Report), Title input, and Description textarea
Submitting calls the backend and shows a success toast
The modal closes after successful submission
Form validates that title and description are non-empty before submitting

file_operations.description: Add state management for the feedback modal (open/close state). Pass a toggleFeedbackModal function to Layout via props. Wire the FeedbackModal component into the main app render tree, conditional on modal open state.

Add a Feedback button in the header navigation area (between existing nav items and the login section) that calls the toggleFeedbackModal function passed via props. The button should only be visible when isAuthenticated is true.

Create a modal component using shadcn/ui Dialog components. Include a type selector (radio group or tabs) for 'Request a Feature' vs 'Report a Bug', a Title input field, a Description textarea, and Submit/Cancel buttons. Use the useFeedbackSubmit hook to call the backend on form submission. Show a success toast on completion and call the onClose callback to close the modal. Validate that title and description are non-empty before allowing submission.

requirements.summary: Add React Query hooks for feedback submission, fetching submissions, and deleting submissions
acceptanceCriteria: useDeleteFeedback mutation hook wraps actor.deleteFeedbackSubmission and invalidates the submissions query on success

file_operations.description: Create a mutation hook that calls actor.submitFeedback with submissionType (FeatureRequest or BugReport enum), title, and description. On success, invalidate the 'feedbackSubmissions' query key and show a success toast. Return the mutation result including isLoading and error states.

Create a query hook that calls actor.getFeedbackSubmissions to fetch all feedback submissions. Use queryKey ['feedbackSubmissions']. Only enable the query when the actor is available. Return the query result with typed FeedbackSubmission array data.

Create a mutation hook that calls actor.deleteFeedbackSubmission with a submission ID (bigint). On success, invalidate the 'feedbackSubmissions' query key and show a success toast. On error, show an error toast. Return the mutation result including isLoading state.

requirements.summary: Add a Feedback Submissions section to the AdminPanel component displaying all submitted feedback with delete capability
acceptanceCriteria: The AdminPanel shows a Feedback Submissions section
Each submission displays type badge, title, description, short user ID, full principal, and formatted timestamp
Admins can delete submissions with a confirmation step or delete button
Empty state message is shown when no submissions exist
Section is only visible to admins and owner (gated by existing isOwner/isAdmin checks)

file_operations.description: Add a new collapsible section titled 'Feedback Submissions' after the existing User Status Management section. Import and render the FeedbackSubmissions component within this section. The section is already protected by the existing admin/owner authorization checks in AdminPanel.

Create a component that uses the useFeedbackSubmissions and useDeleteFeedback hooks. Display submissions in a table or card list format. For each submission, show: a colored badge indicating submission type (FeatureRequest in blue, BugReport in red), title, description, submitter's 8-character user ID (generated via userIdGenerator utility), submitter's full principal, and formatted timestamp (using date formatting). Include a Delete button for each submission that triggers the useDeleteFeedback mutation with confirmation (using a confirm dialog or Alert component). Show a loading spinner when fetching, and an empty state message ('No feedback submissions yet') when the array is empty.
